zh.lifeSummary: Isaac Chamblee是Chamley的兒子，於1730年出生在美國北卡羅來納州韋克。他於大約1770年與Lucretia Jones在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1800年12月享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isaac Chamblee是Chamley的儿子，于1730年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州韋克。他于大约1770年与Lucretia Jones在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1800年12月享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chamblee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Chambley  .

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: Isaac Chamblee was born in 1730, in Wake, North Carolina, United States as the son of Chamley. He married Lucretia Jones about 1770, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in December 1800, at the age of 70.

Lui sposato Lucretia Jones circa 1770, nel Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1800, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Chambleeは1730年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ワクでChamleyの息子として生まれた。約1770年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州でLucretia Jonesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1800年12月に70歳で死去した。

ko.Bertie, Carolina, British Colonial Ameri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 버티
ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Chamblee(은)는 1730년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 Chamley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1770년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Lucretia Jones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1800년 12월 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bertie, Carolina, British Colonial Ameri: бирти, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Isaac Chamblee родился в 1730 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Его отца звали Chamley. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucretia Jones около 1770 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1800 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
